title: Parents (magazine)
body: Parents is a digital media site, formerly run as an American monthly magazine, founded in 1926 that featured scientific information on child development geared to help parents in raising their children. Subscribers were notified of the magazine's dissolution via a postcard mailing in March 2022.
categories: Defunct lifestyle magazines published in the United States
Defunct magazines published in New York City
